prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='DWT_catboost', seasonality_champion='CWT_svr', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals significant model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=4.71) and high seasonality variance (0.61), indicating models capture patterns very differently. DWT_catboost leads trend tracking while CWT_svr excels at seasonality. The early/late horizon specialists differ substantially, suggesting per-horizon selection could help. Given the high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination with mixed weighting is optimal to leverage diverse model strengths.
